headlines.title: Rep. Mike Collins wins GOP runoff in Georgia Senate race
headlines.description: NBC News projects Collins will face Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff in one of the most competitive Senate races this year.

headlines.title: Democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George opens up lead in Washington, D.C., mayoral primary
headlines.description: Lewis George, a member of the City Council, has a significant edge over her nearest rival, Kenyan McDuffie, with about two-thirds of the vote counted and the race too early to call.

headlines.title: Trump-endorsed Rep. Barry Moore wins GOP primary runoff in Alabama Senate race
headlines.description: NBC News projects Moore defeated former Navy SEAL Jared Hudson to advance to the general election to succeed Sen. Tommy Tuberville.

headlines.title: Rep. Kevin Hern wins GOP Senate primary in Oklahoma
headlines.description: Hern’s primary win, NBC News projects, makes him a heavy favorite to win Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin’s old Senate seat in November.

headlines.title: Trump Wraps G7 Amid Calls to Release Full Details of Iran Deal
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is wrapping his talks with world leaders at the closely-watched G7 summit in France where many of those conversations revolved around his plan to end the United States' war with Iran. But the plan hasn't been released publicly or even seen by the president's allies on Capitol Hill, with the uncertainty leading to more questions about what exactly the deal achieves and what it might cost. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump under pressure to reveal text of Iran deal
headlines.description: President Trump said he will reveal the text of the Iran deal on Friday – perhaps during a press conference where he would read it ‘word for word.’ NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Triplete y máximo goleador: Messi es el Superior Player of the Match presentado por Michelob Ultra
headlines.description: El campeón del mundo firmó una noche épica en Kansas City ante Argelia: anotó tres goles, igualó a Klose como máximo anotador en los Mundiales y lideró una actuación que hizo soñar a toda Argentina con el bicampeonato en el Mundial 2026.

headlines.title: BOMBAZO y GOLAZO de Kylian Mbappé para su doblete vs Senegal
headlines.description: El futbolista del Real Madrid sacó un potente disparo desde fuera del área para firmar uno de los goles más espectaculares de lo que va del Mundial 2026.

headlines.title: ¡Doblete de Haaland! Aprovechó un error de Irak y pone el 2-1
headlines.description: Erling tuvo un debut soñado en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 y logró dos goles en el primer tiempo; en su segunda anotación, presionó a Irak y aprovechó un error en el área chica, poniendo el 2-1 para Noruega.

headlines.title: ¡Messi presente! Golazo del 10 pone a soñar a Argentina en su debut en el Mundial ante Argelia
headlines.description: Tras un gran pase filtrado de Rodrigo de Paul, el capitán del Campeón del mundo recibió la pelota, se perfiló y desde afuera del área se inventó un zurdazo para colgarla al ángulo y adelantar a la “Albiceleste” en su presentación desde Kansas City.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Four World Cup games, four tightly contested draws Monday
headlines.description: The last time four World Cup matches on the same day ended in a tie, Pelé was the 17-year-old breakout star and Frenchman Just Fontaine went on to score a tournament-record 13 goals.

headlines.title: Kansas City is using ‘Midwestern pioneering spirit’ to host the World Cup
headlines.description: It might be the smallest U.S. city to host the FIFA World Cup this summer, but Kansas City organizers are hoping to be considered the mightiest by fans who will be arriving in the Midwest to celebrate the biggest single-sport tournament in the world.
